title: lisianthius auratus
intro: Lisianthius auratus, also known as the golden lisianthus or prairie gentian, is a flowering plant species native to the southwestern United States and Mexico. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, fighting infections, and even exhibiting antioxidant activity. Lisianthius auratus can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in topical applications for skin and wound healing.
